headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: In the event of a Dispute, either party shall have the right to immediately file for resolution through an Arbitration. However, notwithstanding a Dispute, the written orders of the Contractor shall be followed and Subcontractor shall continue  to  perform  its  obligations  under  the  Subcontract  and  continue  with  the  Subcontract  Work  until  the Subcontract Work is completed in its entirety.
